title_variants: King‑Bed Studio with 50" TV & Fast Wi‑Fi – Whitefield
Walk‑to Metrolink, Aldi & Restaurants – Private Studio
analysis.rewritten_desc:
Enjoy a private ground‑floor studio in a quiet Whitefield residential street, designed for comfort and convenience. A dedicated entrance and self‑check‑in let you arrive and leave on your schedule. The space sleeps up to four guests – a luxurious pocket‑sprung king‑size bed with a memory‑foam topper, a deep memory‑foam floor mattress (75 × 190 cm) for an extra adult or child, and a travel cot for a baby (provided free of charge). 

The fully equipped kitchen boasts a fridge/freezer, oven, hob, microwave, toaster, and a Quooker boiling‑water tap, plus all cookware, crockery and a complimentary breakfast hamper with Nespresso pods. Stay connected with 150 MB fibre Wi‑Fi, stream on the 50‑inch HDTV, or unwind under the ceiling fan and central heating. The modern bathroom supplies shampoo, conditioner, shower gel and fresh towels. 

Secure driveway parking with CCTV is included, and an EV charger is available on request. Laundry service can be arranged, and extra amenities such as an iron, safe, wardrobe, and sound system are provided. Walk to Metrolink, local buses, Aldi and a selection of popular restaurants, making business or leisure stays effortless. Book now for a hassle‑free Whitefield experience.
analysis.photo_order_rec: Use the king‑bed image with the pocket‑sprung mattress as the cover photo – it showcases the premium sleeping experience and instantly catches the eye.
key_diagnosis: Cover photo is not the king‑bed shot; swapping it could boost click‑through rates (48 photos currently, but the lead image isn’t the most compelling).
Missing in‑unit washing machine and dryer – adding them or highlighting the laundry service more prominently could raise appeal, especially for families staying up to 4 guests.
Title omits high‑value perks like free parking and self‑check‑in; a revised title would better match search queries and could help fill the 40 open nights (£3,656 potential revenue).
analysis.outreach_hook: You have 40 open nights worth about £3,656 in potential earnings – a stronger cover photo and a title that spotlights free parking could help fill them fast.
